---
title: 'Resources'
date: '2020-09-01T23:17:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'The Dirty Pastor'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '610512126646512053'
blogger_filename: '/p/resources.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Dirty Pastor/feed.atom'
---

<p>&nbsp;A collection of articles and tools from myself and around the web to help you grow and thrive in your understanding of your body, spouses body, and the enjoyment of what God created them to be.&nbsp;</p><p><b>Note</b>: Not all resources linked here are distinctly Christian. The linking of a specific resource is not an endorsement of that author in all their resources. Nevertheless, since the The Church has failed to step up to the plate and get brutally honest and detailed about the amazing human body God created, I have decided to include resources from non-Christian sources that will help you understand your body, your heart, and increase your enjoyment of sex and healing in sexuality.&nbsp;</p><p><br /></p><p><b>Books</b></p><p></p><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>TBA</li></ul><div><br /></div><p></p><p><b>Blogs/Websites</b></p><p></p><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>TBA</li></ul><div><br /></div><p></p><p><b>YouTube</b></p><p></p><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JHX8Poeo0Qo&amp;feature=youtu.be&amp;fbclid=IwAR20irv4QLgNshSL-4RkKO_y54i7pk70K1Q54d7bEDJPxU7B7O7kI2S276E" target="_blank">How to Squirt</a>, by Aida Lucie</li></ul><p></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p>
